meaning: n.pl.[生]上皮细胞(epithclium的复数形式)
examples: The reserve cells of these epithelia are the cuboidal, non-ciliated Clara cells.
The superficial epithelia cells do not bind the active ingredient and thus only serve as a transit area.
Conclusion: the stability of tear film decreases and the epithelia of cornea and conjunctiva destructs in diabetic patients.
